title: PM, Ministers perform Yoga in Colombo
body_lines: COLOMBO (News 1st); The Prime Minister, including several Ministers engaged in a Yoga session organized by the Indian High Commission in commemoration of the 8th International Day of Yoga celebrations in Colombo.
The session was held in the presence of Prime Minister Ranil Wickremesinghe, several Ministers and Parliamentarians, and the crowd was introduced to basic asanas, breathing exercises and meditation.
The event marked the culmination of a series of yoga events across Sri Lanka over the past few days.
